segments.text: That was like the one time I definitely needed the Melee Legends.
Like, I needed the Melee Legends on that one, bro.
Yeah, zackray going for the greatest hit sequence ever.
How do you time that, bro?

full_text: That was like the one time I definitely needed the Melee Legends. Like, I needed the Melee Legends on that one, bro. Yeah, zackray going for the greatest hit sequence ever. Oh, my God! How do you time that, bro? He had limit. What?
